title: Dromath
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Dromath |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|My father was her hero and the love of her life.|Rade Dromath on his parents|''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Dromath''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officer who met [[Dynba Tesc]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] when she was rescued from [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] along with [[Lai Nootka]] during [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[Great Evacuation]] operation. He later [[Marriage/Legends|married]] Tesc and [[Parent/Legends|fathered]] a son with her, [[Rade Dromath]] before his [[Death/Legends|death]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|I'm not a joiner, Captain. All I want is to be left alone. Your fight isn't my fight.''"
"''Perhaps not, but you're smart enough to know the Empire won't leave you alone. You will fight them, just as you did in getting these folks out of Garqi. If you have to fight them, doing so with allies is a lot better than doing it alone.|Corran Horn and Dromath|{{JournalCite|7|Missed Chance}}}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Dromath was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Dromath witnessed [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] actions during his [[Great Evacuation]] operation on [[Garqi]] that led to [[Dynba Tesc]]'s escape from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Impressed with Horn's [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] skills, Dromath encouraged the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] to look into joining [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] which was being reformed and in need of good pilots. He and Horn separated, but Dromath and Tesc became closer. They fell in love, [[Marriage/Legends|married]] and had a [[Youngling/Legends|child]] together, [[Rade Dromath]]. Dromath's military service continued under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and he fought and [[Death/Legends|died]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|7|Missed Chance|reprint=1}} {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Dromath }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Force officers]]
